metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace with Sentinel enabled

properties.description: Detects multiple failed logon attempts (Event ID 4625) from the same source IP within a short time window, indicating a potential brute force attack against Windows systems.
properties.query:
SecurityEventDemo_CL
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), TargetAccounts = dcount(Account), TopAccount = take_any(Account), TopActivity = take_any(Activity), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by IpAddress, Computer
| where FailedAttempts >= 5
| extend Duration = LastAttempt - FirstAttempt
| project IpAddress, Computer, TopAccount, FailedAttempts, TargetAccounts, TopActivity, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt, Duration

properties.displayName: [Demo] Privilege Escalation - New Account with Special Privileges
properties.description: Detects when a new user account is created (Event ID 4720) followed by special logon privileges (Event ID 4672), which may indicate privilege escalation.
properties.query:
let NewAccounts = SecurityEventDemo_CL
| where EventID == 4720
| project AccountCreated = Account, CreatedTime = TimeGenerated, Computer;
let SpecialLogons = SecurityEventDemo_CL
| where EventID == 4672
| project Account, PrivilegeTime = TimeGenerated, Computer;
NewAccounts
| join kind=inner (SpecialLogons) on $left.AccountCreated == $right.Account, Computer
| where PrivilegeTime between (CreatedTime .. (CreatedTime + 1h))
| project AccountCreated, Computer, CreatedTime, PrivilegeTime, TimeDelta = PrivilegeTime - CreatedTime

properties.displayName: [Demo] High Volume Firewall Denies from Single Source
properties.description: Detects when a single source IP generates a high volume of firewall deny events, indicating potential reconnaissance or attack activity.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceEventClassID has_any ("deny", "block", "drop")
| summarize DenyCount = count(), TargetIPs = dcount(DestinationIP), TopTargetIP = take_any(DestinationIP), TargetPorts = dcount(DestinationPort), TopPort = take_any(DestinationPort) by SourceIP, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct
| where DenyCount >= 50
| project SourceIP, TopTargetIP, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, DenyCount, TargetIPs, TargetPorts, TopPort

properties.description: Detects high and critical severity IDS alerts that may indicate active intrusion attempts or successful compromise.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceEventClassID has_any ("intrusion", "ids", "ips", "attack")
| where toint(LogSeverity) >= 8 or LogSeverity in ("High", "Critical")
| summarize AlertCount = count(), Activities = make_set(Activity) by SourceIP, DestinationIP, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, LogSeverity
| where AlertCount >= 1
| project SourceIP, DestinationIP, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, LogSeverity, AlertCount, Activities

properties.description: Detects when network traffic matches known threat intelligence indicators, suggesting communication with malicious infrastructure.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceEventClassID has_any ("threatintel", "ioc", "malware", "c2", "command")
| project TimeGenerated, SourceIP, DestinationIP, Activity, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, LogSeverity, RequestURL, Protocol, DestinationPort
| extend ThreatIndicator = coalesce(RequestURL, DestinationIP)

properties.description: Detects multiple failed Entra ID sign-in attempts targeting the same user account, indicating a brute force attack.
properties.query:
SigninLogDemo_CL
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), SourceIPs = dcount(IPAddress), TopSourceIP = take_any(IPAddress), Locations = make_set(Location), TopApp = take_any(AppDisplayName), Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedAttempts >= 5
| project UserPrincipalName, TopSourceIP, TopApp, FailedAttempts, SourceIPs, Apps, Locations, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt

properties.description: Detects when multiple user accounts experience failed sign-ins from the same IP address, indicating a credential stuffing attack using leaked credentials.
properties.query:
SigninLogDemo_CL
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize TargetedUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName), FailedAttempts = count(), TopUser = take_any(UserPrincipalName), UserList = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10), TopApp = take_any(AppDisplayName), Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName) by IPAddress, Location
| where TargetedUsers >= 3 and FailedAttempts >= 5
| project IPAddress, Location, TopUser, TopApp, TargetedUsers, FailedAttempts, UserList, Apps

properties.description: Detects Entra ID sign-ins that have elevated risk levels during the sign-in process, potentially indicating compromised credentials or suspicious activity.
properties.query:
SigninLogDemo_CL
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium")
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location, AppDisplayName, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskLevelAggregated, ResultType, ResultDescription, ClientAppUsed
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.displayName: [Demo] SSH Brute Force Attack on Linux
properties.description: Detects multiple failed SSH authentication attempts from the same source IP, indicating a brute force attack against Linux systems.
properties.query:
SyslogDemo_CL
| where ProcessName == "sshd" and SyslogMessage has "Failed"
| parse SyslogMessage with * "for " TargetUser " from" *
| parse SyslogMessage with * "from " AttackerIP " port" *
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), TopAttackerIP = take_any(AttackerIP), TopTargetUser = take_any(TargetUser), TargetUsers = dcount(TargetUser), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, HostIP
| where FailedAttempts >= 5
| project Computer, HostIP, TopAttackerIP, TopTargetUser, TargetUsers, FailedAttempts, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt, Duration = LastAttempt - FirstAttempt

properties.description: Detects failed sudo attempts or unusual sudo command patterns that may indicate privilege escalation attempts on Linux systems.
properties.query:
SyslogDemo_CL
| where ProcessName == "sudo" and SyslogMessage has_any ("authentication failure", "NOT in sudoers", "incorrect password")
| parse SyslogMessage with SudoUser " : " *
| summarize FailedSudoAttempts = count(), TopUser = take_any(SudoUser), Users = make_set(SudoUser), Commands = make_set(SyslogMessage, 5) by Computer, HostIP
| where FailedSudoAttempts >= 3
| project Computer, HostIP, TopUser, Users, FailedSudoAttempts, Commands

properties.description: Detects critical service failures on Linux systems that may indicate system instability, attacks, or misconfigurations.
properties.query:
SyslogDemo_CL
| where SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg")
| where SyslogMessage has_any ("failed", "error", "crash", "stopped", "killed")
| summarize ErrorCount = count(), Services = make_set(ProcessName, 10), Messages = make_set(SyslogMessage, 5), TopHostIP = take_any(HostIP) by Computer, SeverityLevel
| where ErrorCount >= 2
| project Computer, TopHostIP, SeverityLevel, ErrorCount, Services, Messages

properties.description: Detects a single source IP hitting many destination ports through a Ubiquiti firewall, indicating network reconnaissance or port scanning activity.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Ubiquiti"
| where DeviceEventClassID has "deny"
| summarize DeniedPorts = dcount(DestinationPort), DenyCount = count(), TargetIPs = dcount(DestinationIP), TopTargetIP = take_any(DestinationIP), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIP, DeviceProduct
| where DeniedPorts >= 10
| project SourceIP, TopTargetIP, DeviceProduct, DeniedPorts, DenyCount, TargetIPs, FirstSeen, LastSeen, Duration = LastSeen - FirstSeen

properties.description: Detects intrusion detection alerts from Ubiquiti UniFi appliances. UniFi IDS alerts with high severity may indicate exploitation attempts or active attacks against the network perimeter.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Ubiquiti"
| where DeviceEventClassID has "intrusion"
| summarize AlertCount = count(), Activities = make_set(Activity, 10), TargetIPs = make_set(DestinationIP, 10), TopTargetIP = take_any(DestinationIP) by SourceIP, DeviceProduct, LogSeverity
| where AlertCount >= 1
| project SourceIP, TopTargetIP, DeviceProduct, LogSeverity, AlertCount, Activities, TargetIPs

properties.description: Detects VPN connections through Ubiquiti appliances from external IPs that also triggered firewall denies or IDS alerts, indicating a potentially compromised VPN tunnel or unauthorized access.
properties.query:
let VPNConnections = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Ubiquiti"
| where DeviceEventClassID has "vpn"
| project VPNTime = TimeGenerated, SourceIP, DestinationIP, DeviceProduct, Activity;
let SuspiciousIPs = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Ubiquiti"
| where DeviceEventClassID has_any ("deny", "intrusion")
| summarize DenyCount = count() by SourceIP
| where DenyCount >= 3;
VPNConnections
| join kind=inner (SuspiciousIPs) on SourceIP
| project VPNTime, SourceIP, DestinationIP, DeviceProduct, Activity, PriorDenies = DenyCount

properties.displayName: [Demo] Brute Force PIN Cracked — Successful Guess
properties.description: Detects when a user successfully guesses the secret PIN in the live brute force demo. A successful attempt following multiple failures is a strong indicator that the code was brute-forced.
properties.query:
let Successes = BruteForceDemo_CL
| where AttemptResult == "Success"
| project SuccessTime = TimeGenerated, Nickname, Pincode, SourceIP, UserAgent;
let FailuresBeforeSuccess = BruteForceDemo_CL
| where AttemptResult == "Failure"
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), FirstFailure = min(TimeGenerated), LastFailure = max(TimeGenerated) by Nickname, SourceIP;
Successes
| join kind=inner (FailuresBeforeSuccess) on Nickname, SourceIP
| where LastFailure <= SuccessTime
| project SuccessTime, Nickname, Pincode, SourceIP, UserAgent, FailedAttempts, FirstFailure, LastFailure, TimeToSuccess = SuccessTime - FirstFailure

properties.description: Detects suspicious IAM activity in AWS CloudTrail — creating users, access keys, or attaching policies from unusual IPs.
properties.query:
AWSCloudTrailDemo_CL
| where EventSource == 'iam.amazonaws.com'
| where EventName in ('CreateUser', 'CreateAccessKey', 'AttachUserPolicy', 'PutUserPolicy', 'CreateLoginProfile')
| where isempty(ErrorCode)
| summarize ActionCount = count(), Actions = make_set(EventName), Regions = make_set(AWSRegion), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIPAddress, UserIdentityArn, RecipientAccountId
| where ActionCount >= 2
| extend AccountId = RecipientAccountId

properties.description: Detects high-volume S3 object access or bucket policy changes that may indicate data exfiltration.
properties.query:
AWSCloudTrailDemo_CL
| where EventSource == 's3.amazonaws.com'
| where EventName in ('GetObject', 'ListBuckets', 'GetBucketPolicy', 'PutBucketPolicy')
| where isempty(ErrorCode)
| summarize ObjectAccesses = countif(EventName == 'GetObject'), PolicyChanges = countif(EventName in ('GetBucketPolicy', 'PutBucketPolicy')), TotalActions = count(), Buckets = make_set(extract(@'/buckets/([^/]+)', 1, RequestParameters)), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIPAddress, UserIdentityArn, RecipientAccountId
| where ObjectAccesses >= 3 or PolicyChanges >= 1
| extend AccountId = RecipientAccountId

properties.description: Detects when CloudTrail logging is stopped, trails are deleted, or security groups are opened — indicating defensive evasion or security config tampering.
properties.query:
AWSCloudTrailDemo_CL
| where EventName in ('StopLogging', 'DeleteTrail', 'DeleteFlowLogs', 'AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress', 'DisableEbsEncryptionByDefault')
| where isempty(ErrorCode)
| summarize ActionCount = count(), Actions = make_set(EventName), Regions = make_set(AWSRegion), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIPAddress, UserIdentityArn, RecipientAccountId
| extend AccountId = RecipientAccountId

properties.description: Detects multiple failed AWS Console login attempts from the same source IP, indicating a brute force attack against AWS IAM credentials.
properties.query:
AWSCloudTrailDemo_CL
| where EventName == 'ConsoleLogin'
| where ErrorCode == 'AccessDenied' or ErrorMessage has 'Failed authentication'
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), TargetArns = make_set(UserIdentityArn), TargetAccounts = dcount(UserIdentityArn), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIPAddress, RecipientAccountId
| where FailedAttempts >= 5
| extend Duration = LastAttempt - FirstAttempt, AccountId = RecipientAccountId

properties.description: Detects suspicious IAM policy changes in GCP — creating service account keys, setting overly permissive IAM policies, or creating new service accounts.
properties.query:
GCPAuditLogsDemo_CL
| where ServiceName == 'iam.googleapis.com'
| where MethodName has_any ('CreateServiceAccountKey', 'SetIamPolicy', 'CreateServiceAccount')
| where StatusCode == 0
| summarize ActionCount = count(), Methods = make_set(MethodName), Resources = make_set(ResourceName), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by CallerIP, PrincipalEmail, ProjectId
| where ActionCount >= 2

properties.description: Detects high-volume GCS object access or BigQuery export jobs that may indicate data exfiltration from GCP resources.
properties.query:
GCPAuditLogsDemo_CL
| where ServiceName in ('storage.googleapis.com', 'bigquery.googleapis.com')
| where MethodName in ('storage.objects.get', 'storage.objects.list', 'storage.buckets.getIamPolicy', 'jobservice.insert')
| where StatusCode == 0
| summarize ObjectReads = countif(MethodName == 'storage.objects.get'), BQExports = countif(MethodName == 'jobservice.insert'), TotalActions = count(), Resources = make_set(ResourceName), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by CallerIP, PrincipalEmail, ProjectId
| where ObjectReads >= 3 or BQExports >= 1

properties.description: Detects deletion or modification of firewall rules and audit log sinks in GCP, indicating defensive evasion or security config tampering.
properties.query:
GCPAuditLogsDemo_CL
| where MethodName has_any ('firewalls.delete', 'firewalls.insert', 'DeleteSink', 'UpdateSink')
| where StatusCode == 0
| summarize ActionCount = count(), Methods = make_set(MethodName), Resources = make_set(ResourceName), Services = make_set(ServiceName), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by CallerIP, PrincipalEmail, ProjectId

properties.description: Detects multiple authentication failures from the same IP in GCP, indicating a brute force attack against GCP identities.
properties.query:
GCPAuditLogsDemo_CL
| where MethodName has 'loginFailure'
| where StatusCode == 7
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), TargetPrincipals = make_set(PrincipalEmail), TargetCount = dcount(PrincipalEmail), Projects = make_set(ProjectId), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by CallerIP
| where FailedAttempts >= 5
| extend Duration = LastAttempt - FirstAttempt

value: [Demo] Privilege Escalation - New Account with Special Privileges
[Demo] High Volume Firewall Denies from Single Source
[Demo] SSH Brute Force Attack on Linux
[Demo] Brute Force PIN Cracked — Successful Guess
